triples.subject: electric vehicles
triples.sentence: All forms of electric vehicles (EVs) can help improve fuel economy, lower fuel costs, and reduce emissions.

triples.subject: transportation sector
triples.sentence: The transportation sector is the largest source of greenhouse gas emissions in the United States.

triples.subject: manufacturers of electric vehicles
triples.sentence: Several manufacturers of electric vehicles are offering 8-year/100,000-mile battery warranties.

triples.subject: transportation sector
triples.sentence: The transportation sector accounts for approximately 30% of total U.S.

triples.subject: electric grid
triples.sentence: All-electric vehicles and PHEVs have the benefit of flexible charging because the electric grid is near most locations where people park.

triples.subject: EV charging station
triples.object: energy from the electric grid to a vehicle’s battery
triples.sentence: To safely deliver energy from the electric grid to a vehicle’s battery, an EV charging station, sometimes referred to as electric vehicle supply equipment (EVSE), is needed.
